productDisplayName: Puma Deccan Chargers Kids Navy Blue Replica Jersey
description: CompositionNavy blue jersey made of 100% polyester, has a notched collar, short raglan sleeves with printed branding on the right sleeve, Deccan Chargers logo on the left chest, mesh panel stitch on the back to wick away sweat and the Indian tricoloured tape detail at the back neck in elastic fabricFitRegularWash careMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm ironCrank up your little one's style as the cricket craze kicks off this summer with this Deccan Chargers Replica Jersey from puma. The apple of your eye will be displaying Deccan pride with this Chargers jersey even as you cheer your team at the IPL. There's no better way of saying 'Go Chargers!' than with this jersey!
